_guardrail_note: max_daily_loss_pct is the hard kill switch (cap 10.0, never weaken). risk_pct ceiling is 4.0 (user-chosen) - the reviewer may lower it in drawdowns but must NEVER exceed 4.0. Validate strategy changes with backtest.py before deploying. Every change is git-committed and revertible.
